race.comment: SEPTEMBER BORN (5) is an interesting horse on resumption. He's always had hype and while he's not lived up to it, he's also not been disappointing in what he's done. He's got a good fresh record and lands here without a trial which intrigues. Has plenty of ability however and may just be too good. IMMORTAL BLISS (2) was too good in his first run for the new stable, winning by 0.8L at this track and trip 35 days ago. Fiore remains in the saddle, though this time he's drawn out wide. Will need a bit of luck, but he's right in this if the breaks come. PETULA (3) trialled nicely around some Quokka contenders coming into this and she looks back on song. She's had a few niggles along the way, but her best is good enough for a race like this and it wouldn't surprise to see her return with a bang. HORCRUX (8) can be in this for a long way with his early speed. KING ADVISO (6) is drawn low and will take catching under Steve Parnham.
